name: PRECISION OPTICS CORPORATION, INC.
summary: Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. (POCI) has been a developer and manufacturer of advanced optical instruments since 1982, operating in medical devices and defense/aerospace markets. The company produces endoscopes, endocouplers, Microprecision lenses, micro medical cameras, CMOS-based digital imaging endoscopes (including single-use designs), and custom optical assemblies. Through its Ross Optical division, it supplies custom optical components and assemblies. Its four business areas are systems manufacturing, engineering and product development, Ross Optical, and a micro-optics laboratory.

products.name: Microprecision Lenses
products.description: Ultra-small optical lenses enabling millimeter-sized endoscopes with high image quality for minimally invasive surgery.

products.name: Micro Medical Cameras
products.description: Millimeter-scale digital cameras using CMOS sensor technology for medical imaging and single-use endoscopic applications.

products.name: Endoscopes and Endocouplers
products.description: Traditional and digital imaging endoscopes including single-use designs for minimally invasive surgical procedures.

products.name: Unity Imaging Platform
products.description: Modular baseline CMOS endoscopic system with customizable sub-components for reusable and single-use endoscopic systems, launched January 2025.

products.name: Ross Optical Components and Assemblies
products.description: Custom optical components including lenses, prisms, mirrors, windows, and mechano-optical assemblies with thin-film coatings for military, medical, and industrial markets.

products.name: Defense/Aerospace Optical Assemblies
products.description: Custom optical systems for defense and aerospace applications including satellite network communications.

partnerships.description: Acquired operating assets June 2019; expanded optical components and assemblies business for military, medical, and industrial markets.
Acquired operating assets October 2021; expanded electrical engineering capabilities for end-to-end medical visualization devices.
